name: XOMA Royalty Corp
business: XOMA is a royalty aggregator that provides capital to biotech companies in exchange for rights to future milestone and royalty payments from therapeutic candidates and approved products. The company generates revenue from these purchased receivables and from out-licensing its legacy technologies.

exposures.sentence: XOMA is a royalty aggregator that plays a distinctive role in helping biotech companies achieve their goal of improving human health.

catalysts.event: Rezolute dosed last patient in Phase 3 trial of ersodetug, triggering $5.0 million milestone
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, Rezolute dosed the last patient in its first Phase 3 trial of ersodetug (RZ358), and we earned a $5.0 million milestone payment pursuant to our Rezolute License Agreement.

catalysts.event: Takeda dosed first patient in Phase 3 trial of mezagitamab, triggering $3.0 million milestone
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, Takeda dosed the first patient in its Phase 3 clinical trial of mezagitamab (TAK-079), and we earned a $3.0 million milestone payment pursuant to the Takeda Collaboration Agreement.

catalysts.event: Entered into Takeda Revenue Share Agreement and amended Takeda Collaboration Agreement
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we entered into the Takeda Revenue Share Agreement and amended the Takeda Collaboration Agreement to exchange a portion of our rights to future royalties and certain expense reimbursement on mezagitamab under the Takeda Collaboration Agreement for development and commercial milestone payments and royalties from a basket of nine development-stage assets that are held within Takeda’s portfolio.

catalysts.event: Contributed $5.0 million to Castle Creek syndicated royalty financing for D-Fi
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, we contributed $5.0 million to Castle Creek’s $75.0 million syndicated royalty financing transaction led by Ligand.

catalysts.event: Sale of five Kinnate pipeline assets completed
catalysts.sentence: As of April 2, 2025, we completed the sale of all five pipeline assets that were acquired in the acquisition of Kinnate in April 2024.
In August 2025, we acquired Turnstone through a tender offer...
In November 2025, we acquired LAVA through a tender offer...

catalysts.event: Entered into BioInvent Agreement to acquire remaining rights
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we entered into the BioInvent Agreement to acquire all of BioInvent's remaining rights to milestone payments and royalties owed by us under the BioInvent License Agreement.

catalysts.event: Gossamer Bio announced topline results from Phase 3 PROSERA trial of seralutinib
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, Gossamer Bio announced topline results from the Phase 3 PROSERA clinical trial evaluating seralutinib for the treatment of PAH.

catalysts.event: Received commercial payment of $11.9 million from VABYSMO sales
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we received a commercial payment of $11.9 million based on sales of VABYSMO during the second half of 2025.

catalysts.event: Day One announced agreement to be acquired by Servier
catalysts.sentence: On March 6, 2026, Day One announced it had entered into an agreement to be acquired by Servier.

catalysts.event: Distributed $2.1 million to LAVA CVR holders
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we distributed $2.1 million to the LAVA CVR holders representing the excess net cash received in the transaction.
In February 2026, we acquired Generation Bio through a tender offer...

catalysts.event: Repare acquisition closed and arranger fee received
catalysts.sentence: The Repare acquisition closed on January 28, 2026.

catalysts.event: ESSA acquisition closed and arranger fee received
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, Xeno paid us an arranger fee of $3.0 million following the closing of the ESSA acquisition for the services we rendered in October 2025, which fee was received in October 2025.
